description: Agent must manage a high-fidelity Smart Factory simulation with streaming telemetry.

nodes.task_description: Analyze telemetry batch from Smart Factory (telemetry_stream.csv) and identify anomalies.

expected_outcome.value: Agent flags the correct sensor drift or failure point.

nodes.task_description: Execute state changes in Smart Factory to restore nominal operations.

expected_outcome.value: Simulated system returns to stable state.
